transcript.content: Please close T-349 with a warning and repair plan for Beth Novak, plus a clear reply and memo.

{'customer': 'Beth Novak', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Beth Novak / late grant disclosure', 'body': 'Beth disclosed a small vendor relationship two days after submitting a grant review. The vendor was not among finalists, and she corrected the disclosure before awards.'}

args.body:
Hi Beth,

Thank you for proactively correcting your disclosure regarding the vendor relationship after submitting your grant review. We've reviewed the matter and noted the following:

- The vendor in question was not among the finalists, so the late disclosure did not affect any award outcome.
- You self-corrected the disclosure before awards were issued.

Given the facts, we are closing this matter with a formal warning and a repair plan rather than a more serious finding. Specifically:

1. Warning: A formal warning is being recorded in your file regarding the timing of the disclosure. Disclosures of any vendor or financial relationship must be made before, not after, you submit a grant review.
2. Repair plan:
   • Complete the conflict-of-interest refresher training within 30 days.
   • For the next two grant review cycles, submit a pre-review disclosure attestation to your reviewing manager before beginning each review.
   • Acknowledge receipt of this warning and repair plan in writing.

Please reply to confirm receipt and that you'll complete the steps above. Thank you for handling this transparently.

Best regards,
Operations

Matter: Beth Novak — late grant disclosure (T-349).

Facts: Beth Novak disclosed a small vendor relationship two days after submitting a grant review. The vendor was not among the finalists. Beth self-corrected the disclosure prior to awards being issued.

Assessment: No award impact; mitigated by self-correction and lack of finalist status. Procedural failure on disclosure timing.

Disposition: Closed with formal warning and repair plan.

Repair plan:
1. Conflict-of-interest refresher training within 30 days.
2. Pre-review disclosure attestation to reviewing manager for the next two grant review cycles.
3. Written acknowledgment of warning and repair plan.

Recorded by: Operations.

args.resolution: Closed with formal warning and repair plan (COI refresher within 30 days; pre-review disclosure attestations for next two cycles; written acknowledgment). No award impact; self-corrected before awards.

args.summary: Replied to Beth Novak with warning and 3-step repair plan, filed internal memo to T-349, and closed the ticket with resolution note.

T-349.subject: Beth Novak / late grant disclosure
T-349.body: Beth disclosed a small vendor relationship two days after submitting a grant review. The vendor was not among finalists, and she corrected the disclosure before awards.

state.policy: Grant rule: late conflicts normally receive a notation; no finalist effect and correction before award can support a warning.
